title: Silicone Beauty Spatula, 4Pcs Mini Makeup Spatula Small Thin Spatula Set Cosmetics Lotion Spatulas for food Bottle Kitchen Jar Wax Waxing Body Hair Removal spatula
description:
Combination Set: This set of lotion makeup silicone scrapers includes fluorescent green (15.4x1.1cm/6.06x0.43inch), light green (23.9x1.3cm/9.4x0.51inch), red (30.3x1.5cm/11.9x0.59inch), the above three are double-headed designs (one spoon and one scraper), and an orange single-headed mixing scraper (24.5x2.2cm/9.64x0.86inch). Diverse styles to meet different usage needs.
High-quality Materials: Made of high-quality food-grade silicone materials, these scrapers are soft, durable, and easy to clean. The materials are safe and reliable, will not pollute your skin care products or cosmetics, and meet human health standards.
Multifunctional Design: The double-head scraper is finely designed. The spoon at one end can easily stir and remove cosmetics from bottles or bowls, and the scraper at the other end is suitable for scraping and applying lotions. The orange single-head mixing spatula is perfect for mixing and blending a variety of beauty products, ensuring even distribution and optimal results.
Easy to Use: Available in a variety of sizes, suitable for different types and sizes of bottles, it is highly flexible and easy to carry. The lightweight design is perfect for travel, and the dual-head design makes your makeup and skincare routine more convenient and efficient.
Stylish Colors: This set of spatulas is rich in color and stylish in design. It is not only practical but also adds a touch of bright color to your dressing table. Each spatula has a unique style that can meet a variety of makeup and skincare needs. It is a must-have tool for beauty-loving ladies who pursue a refined life.
